'''Michael Jan Friedman''' (born [[March 7]], [[1950s#1955|1955]]) is an [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] author. He has written written science fiction, fantasy, paranormal, biographies, and comic books for both [[Wikipedia:DC Comics|DC]] and [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]]. Friedman is the author of a large number of media tie-ins, including over forty [[Wikipedia:List of Star Trek novels|''Star Trek'' novels]].<ref name="Wordpress">{{WordPress|subdomain=glvwgwritestuffblog|url=2015/01/28/meet-michael-jan-friedman/|name=Greater Lehigh Valley Writers Group|text=Meet Michael Jan Friedman|date=2015-01-28|archivedate=20230329065459}}</ref> He was hired to write for ''[[Star Wars]]'' publishing and was slated to pen the [[Knightfall Trilogy|''Knightfall'' Trilogy]] for ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|The New Jedi Order]]'', but the project was eventually canceled and replaced with [[Greg Keyes]]'s [[Edge of Victory Duology|''Edge of Victory'' Duology]].<ref name="Knightfall">{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/books/unjoh/database/Appendices.html|text=The Essential Guide to the Yuuzhan Vong – Appendices|archivedate=20030208035613}}</ref>
